reviews.comment:
Muy lindo lugar pero lerdo el despacho de combustible hoy una de la tarde estuvimos más de cuarenta minutos para cargar NAFTA una sola persona pobre muchacho no da abasto

(Translated by Google)
Very nice place but the fuel service is slow. Today at one in the afternoon we waited more than forty minutes to fill up with gasoline. There was only one person, poor guy, he couldn't keep up.
